summary: Middle East conflict halted economic momentum; Strait of Hormuz closure risk raised energy crisis fears. U.S. blockade of Iranian ports announced (Trump). IMF forecasts global growth at 3.1% with 19% energy price spike assumed. Additional flashpoints: Venezuela, NATO/Greenland, U.S. midterm elections. Tariff uncertainty and Fed leadership transition compound risks.
